prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HC-166Y-CBXN Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 20pc Universal High Speed Burr Bit Set 1/8 Shank (Assorted Tips/Shapes) Description: The 20pc. Universal High Speed Burr Set is the idea accessory for your Dremel or handheld rotary tool. The 1/8" shank allows this set to be used on any type of rotary tool; name brand or not.

These assorted tips are ideal for removal of burrs on glass, metal, stone, wood, ceramics, fiberglass and plastic.

This is ideal for home, garage, and office applications. Search Terms: dremel tool Features: - For High Speed Use - Assorted Shapes & Sizes - Shank: 1/8" - Ideal for use with; motor tools, drills, high speed die grinders, rotarty tools, flex shafts - Universal fit for all rotary tools; name brand or not. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 20-pc High Speed Burr Bit Set 1/8 Shank

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 20-pk High Speed Burr Bit Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Assorted Tips And Shapes, Universal Fit All Rotary Tools, Remove Burrs Glass Metal Stone Wood Ceramics, 18 Inch Shank

openai.title_differentiation: Universal Fit, For Dremel And Rotary Tools, 18" Shank, High Speed Use, Burr Removal On Wood Metal Stone Glass
